widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

If you have Triton and SageAttention installed, connect the Torch Compile Args to gain roughly a 30% speed boost. If these are not available, leave the WAN 2.2 Animate Torch Compile Settings disconnected (disable with Ctrl+B) and set attention_mode to sdpa in the WAN 2.2 Animate Model Loader.
Connect `loaded_fps` to `Set_fps` instead of `source_fps` if you changed the `force_rate` in the `Load Video` node
To use the background/surroundings of the reference image, disable both “Get_mask” and “Get_background_image” connected to the WanVideo Animate Embeds.
